news.headline: Phone Ban for Under-16s Becomes Law
news.summary: Legislation banning smartphone sales to under-16s passed this week, with Big Tech facing fines up to 4% of global turnover for non-compliance.

news.headline: 7 Prime Ministers in 10 Years: Policy Whiplash
news.summary: UK political instability continues to reshape SME planning cycles, with regulatory focus shifting on each transition.

cyber.headline: NHS Trust Ransomware Attempt Neutralised
cyber.summary: A coordinated ransomware attempt across three NHS trusts was flagged and contained within minutes by heuristic detection.

cyber.headline: 68% of UK SMEs Running Vulnerable Legacy Systems
cyber.summary: New analysis shows the majority of small businesses have not migrated off unsupported software, widening the attack surface.

defence.headline: UK Mandates Domestic Silicon for Critical Infrastructure
defence.summary: New sovereign requirements will require critical infrastructure providers to use domestically-produced chips by 2027.

defence.headline: UK Cyber Threat Level Remains at SUBSTANTIAL
defence.summary: NCSC guidance unchanged this week, but flags an uptick in supply-chain targeted attempts against SMEs.

business.headline: Big Tech Shares Dip 4.2% on Phone Ban Announcement
business.summary: Markets reacted quickly to the new legislation, with analysts pointing to opportunities for smaller AI-native platforms.

business.headline: Tech Investment Zones: £2.4B for the Midlands
business.summary: New tax relief zones announced, offering a 10-year window for qualifying digital and cyber businesses to scale.
